nasb.text: since they could not celebrate it at that time, because the priests had not consecrated themselves in sufficient numbers, nor had the people been gathered to Jerusalem.

esv.text: for they could not keep it at that time because the priests had not consecrated themselves in sufficient number, nor had the people assembled in Jerusalem—

ccb.text: 他们不能在一月守节期，因为洁净自己的祭司不够多，民众也没有聚集在耶路撒冷。
